title: notodanthonia violacea
intro: Notodanthonia violacea, also known as the purple danthonia, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Notodanthonia violacea include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Notodanthonia violacea include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
